title: Pthompson
compiled_truth: Pthompson is an external contact at [Andrews Kurth](companies/andrews-kurth). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-11), Pthompson sent 56 and received 329 emails, totalling 385 interactions.
